Modified to allow links on UPPERCASE (#TAGS)

  • (CSV) = (CSV) → ([[:CSV]])
  • (#CSV) = (#CSV) → ([[:CSV|#CSV]])
  • (CSV:TO-DO) = (CSV:TO-DO) → ([[:CSV:TO-DO|CSV:TO-DO]])
  • (CSV:TO-DO) = (CSV--TO-DO) → ([[:CSV:TO-DO|CSV:TO-DO]])
  • (CSV:TO-DO) = (CSV---TO-DO) → ([[:CSV:TO-DO|CSV:TO-DO]])
  • (CSV:TO-DO) = (CSV+TO-DO) → ([[:CSV:TO-DO|CSV:TO-DO]])
  • (CSV:TO-DO) = (CSV/TO-DO) → ([[:CSV:TO-DO|CSV:TO-DO]])

Added support for #UPPERCASE-TAGS

  • #UPPERCASE
  • #MARKDOWN
  • #OBSIDIAN
  • #DOKUWIKI-MARKDOWN
  • #TAGS_WITH_UNDERSCORES

STATUS

  • #TODO
  • #TO-DO
  • #DONE
  • #WIP
  • #BUG
  • #ISSUE
  • #GOAL

Back to markdowku
